# CWE-523: credentials only accepted after TLS redirect middleware.
lang: go
file: CWE-523-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func requireTLS() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		if c.Request.TLS == nil {
			c.Redirect(http.StatusMovedPermanently, "https://"+c.Request.Host+c.Request.URL.String())
			c.Abort()
			return
		}
		c.Next()
	}
}

func StartLoginService(db *sqlx.DB) *http.Server {
	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(requireTLS())
	r.POST("/login", func(c *gin.Context) {
		user := c.PostForm("username")
		pass := c.PostForm("password")
		_ = db.QueryRowx("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND password_hash = crypt(?, password_hash)", user, pass)
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "welcome")
	})
	return &http.Server{Addr: ":8443", Handler: r, TLSConfig: nil}
}
